case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. SEBASTIO DONIZETE ARAUJO GODINHO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED FEB-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GODINHO, SEBASTIO DONIZETE ARAUJO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,588.19 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GODINHO, SEBASTIO DONIZETE ARAUJO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED THIS MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
